page_title: List of Story Mode Missions (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
Story mode follows the tale of the custom character (CC) made at the beginning of the game through the first two seasons of the anime. The game's DLC Final Battle follows different viewpoints from characters in the anime through Season 3.

 

Prologue - Training Corps
